/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/algoviz_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/SortView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/PathView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/HashView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/DPView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/algoviz.dir/src/PlaybackBar.cpp.o -o algoviz  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
